findings.evidence: `rg -n "normalizerQuotientLiftOfSubgroupOf|H.subgroupOf" code/TauCeti/Algebra/Group/NormalizerQuotient.lean` shows the public abbrev at lines 103-107 with `hφ : H.subgroupOf (_root_.Subgroup.normalizer (H : Set G)) ≤ φ.ker`; the roadmap target only needs the stable `N(H)/H` quotient and normal-case comparison.
findings.fix: Make this helper `private` or remove it, and keep `normalizerQuotientLift` plus its ambient-condition lemmas as the public universal property.
findings.issue: `normalizerQuotientLiftOfSubgroupOf` is public API but requires users to mention `H.subgroupOf (Subgroup.normalizer (H : Set G))`, exposing the implementation subgroup instead of the named normalizer quotient interface.

summary: The ambient lift API is present, but the PR still publishes a subgroup-form lift helper that exposes the implementation copy of H inside its normalizer.
